languages.text: На суровые миры, подобные этому, ссылают лишь преступников. Под жестоким надзором они трудятся на благо Вольного Торговца и учатся покаянию. Тех же, кто не перевоспитается, ждет участь вечного механического слуги.

traits.locale_text: На этот суровый мир ссылают лишь преступников. Под жестоким надзором они трудятся на благо Вольного Торговца и учатся покаянию. Тех же, кто не перевоспитается, ждет участь вечного механического слуги.

На суровые миры, подобные этому, ссылают лишь преступников. Под жестоким надзором они трудятся на благо Вольного Торговца и учатся покаянию. Тех же, кто не перевоспитается, ждет участь вечного механического слуги.

languages.text: Only criminals are sent to harsh worlds like this. Under constant watch, they toil to serve the Rogue Trader, to learn obedience. Awaiting those who can't be rehabilitated is the fate of eternal mechanical servitude.
languages.original_text: На суровые миры, подобные этому, ссылают лишь преступников. Под жестоким надзором они трудятся на благо Вольного Торговца и учатся покаянию. Тех же, кто не перевоспитается, ждет участь вечного механического слуги.

traits.locale_text: This is a planet-sized prison where criminals are sent to learn obedience and to serve the Rogue Trader under constant observation. The most hopeless and tough inmates end up as servitors.
This is a planet-sized prison where criminals are sent to learn obedience and to serve the Rogue Trader under constant observation. The most hopeless and tough inmates end up as servitors.

Only criminals are sent to harsh worlds like this. Under constant watch, they toil to serve the Rogue Trader, to learn obedience. Awaiting those who can't be rehabilitated is the fate of eternal mechanical servitude.

Only criminals are sent to harsh worlds like this. Under constant watch, they toil to serve the Rogue Trader, to learn obedience. Awaiting those who can't be rehabilitated is the fate of eternal mechanical servitude.

Only criminals are sent to harsh worlds like this. Under constant watch, they toil to serve the Rogue Trader, to learn obedience. Awaiting those who can't be rehabilitated is the fate of eternal mechanical servitude.

Only criminals are sent to harsh worlds like this. Under constant watch, they toil to serve the Rogue Trader, to learn obedience. Awaiting those who can't be rehabilitated is the fate of eternal mechanical servitude.

languages.text: Nur Kriminelle werden auf solche rauen Welten geschickt. Unter ständiger Bewachung müssen sie schuften, um dem Rogue Trader zu dienen und Gehorsam zu lernen. Auf diejenigen, die nicht rehabilitiert werden können, wartet das Schicksal ewiger mechanischer Knechtschaft.
languages.original_text: Only criminals are sent to harsh worlds like this. Under constant watch, they toil to serve the Rogue Trader, to learn obedience. Awaiting those who can't be rehabilitated is the fate of eternal mechanical servitude.

traits.locale_text: Nur Kriminelle werden auf solche rauen Welten geschickt. Unter ständiger Bewachung müssen sie schuften, um dem Rogue Trader zu dienen und Gehorsam zu lernen. Auf diejenigen, die nicht rehabilitiert werden können, wartet das Schicksal ewiger mechanischer Knechtschaft.

languages.text: Seuls les criminels sont envoyés sur des mondes aussi durs que celui-ci. Sous surveillance constante, ils s'efforcent de servir le marchand malhonnête et d'apprendre à lui obéir. Ceux qui ne peuvent pas être réhabilités sont condamnés à une servitude mécanique éternelle.
languages.original_text: Only criminals are sent to harsh worlds like this. Under constant watch, they toil to serve the Rogue Trader, to learn obedience. Awaiting those who can't be rehabilitated is the fate of eternal mechanical servitude.

traits.locale_text: Seuls les criminels sont envoyés sur des mondes aussi durs que celui-ci. Sous surveillance constante, ils s'efforcent de servir le marchand malhonnête et d'apprendre à lui obéir. Ceux qui ne peuvent pas être réhabilités sont condamnés à une servitude mécanique éternelle.

languages.text: Sólo los criminales son enviados a mundos tan duros como éste. Bajo vigilancia constante, trabajan duro para servir al Comerciante Canalla, para aprender a obedecer. A los que no pueden rehabilitarse les espera el destino de la eterna servidumbre mecánica.
languages.original_text: Only criminals are sent to harsh worlds like this. Under constant watch, they toil to serve the Rogue Trader, to learn obedience. Awaiting those who can't be rehabilitated is the fate of eternal mechanical servitude.

traits.locale_text: Sólo los criminales son enviados a mundos tan duros como éste. Bajo vigilancia constante, trabajan duro para servir al Comerciante Canalla, para aprender a obedecer. A los que no pueden rehabilitarse les espera el destino de la eterna servidumbre mecánica.

languages.text: Sadece suçlular bunun gibi sert dünyalara gönderilir. Sürekli gözetim altında, itaati öğrenmek için Haydut Tüccar'a hizmet etmeye çalışırlar. Islah edilemeyenleri bekleyen kader ise ebedi mekanik köleliktir.
languages.original_text: Only criminals are sent to harsh worlds like this. Under constant watch, they toil to serve the Rogue Trader, to learn obedience. Awaiting those who can't be rehabilitated is the fate of eternal mechanical servitude.

traits.locale_text: Sadece suçlular bunun gibi sert dünyalara gönderilir. Sürekli gözetim altında, itaati öğrenmek için Haydut Tüccar'a hizmet etmeye çalışırlar. Islah edilemeyenleri bekleyen kader ise ebedi mekanik köleliktir.
